title: Microsoft Reins in RoguePlanet Zero-Day Threat
summary: The researcher known as "Nightmare-Eclipse" published a proof-of-concept (PoC) exploit for the Windows Defender vulnerability in early June after dropping several other Microsoft zero-days.
imageAlt: Microsoft Reins in RoguePlanet Zero-Day Threat

fullArticle: The researcher known as "Nightmare-Eclipse" published a proof-of-concept (PoC) exploit for the Windows Defender vulnerability in early June after dropping several other Microsoft zero-days....
